name: Producer License Reciprocity
outcome: Linear one-step chain checking NAIC producer license reciprocity for non-resident filing across target states. Identifies non-standard states (CA, FL, NJ, NY, HI, MN, WI) requiring independent filing, background checks, or state exams outside the standard reciprocity path. Per NAIC MDL-218 and NIPR Reciprocity Matrix 2024. State codes and LOA enum inputs only. Zero PII by construction.
